data.title: Chabaidao Cancels Dividend, Nayuki Swings To Red As Bubble Tea Sector Boils Over
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Chabaidao canceled its previously announced dividend, as management said it needs to keep the money for daily operations
	Nayuki said it fell into the red in the first half of this year due to a weak recovery in consumer demand


By Fai Pui

data.title: Yum China Serves Up Profit, Margin Growth Despite Challenging Consumer Landscape
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Yum China’s revenue rose 4% in the second quarter on a constant currency basis, while its core operating profit rose 12%
	The company is raising its profits and margins by leveraging AI in its in its customer-facing and back-office operations and taking other efficiency-boosting measures


By Doug Young
